overall.description: Third-person gameplay from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt exploring a sunlit palace terrace with golden stone architecture during golden hour. The character ascends grand stairs, walks along a scenic overlook with mountain vistas and statues, observes an ornate gate, then descends to a lower courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered palace staircase with potted plants

agents.ego_description: walking up the grand stone staircase between palace walls, heading toward the upper terrace

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with ornate carved railings ascending between palace walls
golden stone wall with gothic architectural details and arched windows
smooth golden stone wall with decorative trim
intricately carved stone balustrade with floral patterns
lush green bushes and purple flowering plants in stone planters
ornate stone archway leading to upper levels of the palace

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a grand covered stone staircase flanked by golden palace walls and potted plants. The lighting is diffused and warm, with ornate stone railings visible along the left side as the camera follows the character upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit palace terrace with mountain overlook

events.description: exits covered staircase onto open sunlit terrace with panoramic mountain views
emerges from shadow into bright golden hour sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking along the marble terrace toward the scenic overlook with statues

ornate stone balustrade with arched openings overlooking the mountains
distant snow-capped mountains and forested valleys under golden sunlight
golden stone palace facade with tall windows and red roof spires
bright sun low in the sky creating lens flare and long shadows

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered staircase, the scene opens onto a sunlit marble terrace with panoramic mountain views. The character walks toward the ornate stone railing as golden hour sunlight bathes the scene, with the palace building visible to the left and distant peaks ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: palace terrace with statues and guard post

events.description: turns around to walk back along the terrace, passing a guard

agents.ego_description: walking along the terrace, pausing to view the scenery, then turning back toward the palace building

notable_agents.action: palace guard standing at attention near a wooden door, holding a halberd

entered.detail: classical stone statues of robed figures on pedestals flanking the terrace
detailed golden stone wall with gothic arches and wooden doorways
large arched wooden door with metal studs and decorative frame

segments.scene_description: The character explores the terrace, walking past classical stone statues positioned along the marble railing with mountain views. After reaching the overlook, the character turns back toward the palace, passing a stationary guard in armor standing by a large wooden door.

scene_state.functional_zone: palace gate approach with ornate golden architecture

events.description: stops and looks up at the towering gate architecture and spires

agents.ego_description: approaching the ornate gate, then stopping to look up at the towering architecture and spires above

entered.detail: massive ornate gate with golden filigree patterns against bright blue sky
tall Gothic tower with pointed spires and arched windows
elaborate golden stone railing with carved details

segments.scene_description: The character approaches an ornate blue gate framed by towering golden stone architecture. The camera pans upward to reveal Gothic spires and intricate carvings silhouetted against the bright sky, with the sun creating a backlit effect on the stone surfaces.

events.description: descends from the upper terrace to the lower courtyard level

agents.ego_description: walking down the stone stairs toward the lower courtyard where other figures are gathered

notable_agents.action: group of figures standing near the fountain in the lower courtyard

entered.detail: curved stone staircase descending to the lower level
open courtyard area with patterned stone flooring
octagonal stone fountain basin in the center of the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character descends a curved stone staircase from the gate area to a lower courtyard. The scene transitions to show an octagonal stone fountain in the center of the courtyard, with distant figures visible near the fountain and palace archways ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a sheltered palace corridor into a vast, sun-drenched terrace before descending into a lower courtyard. It begins by following the character up a grand covered stone staircase flanked by golden walls and potted plants under warm, diffused light. As the character emerges from the cover, the scene opens onto a wide marble terrace where the lighting shifts to a brilliant golden hour glow, revealing panoramic mountain vistas and classical stone statues along the railing. The camera then tracks the character back toward the palace, passing a stationary guard and approaching an ornate blue gate framed by towering Gothic spires silhouetted against the bright sky. Finally, the movement flows down a curved stone staircase, transitioning from the heights of the architecture to a lower courtyard centered around an octagonal stone fountain.
